title: calea sickii
intro: Calea sickii, also known as Mexican mint marigold, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of calea sickii include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Calea sickii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for its medicinal properties.
